creator: antumdeluge@gmail.com
text:
After updating my Ports I cannot get editors/diakonos to run and I have not been able to figure out which is the offending package/what needs to be reinstalled.

$ diakonos
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.1/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb:54:in `require': cannot load such file -- curses (LoadError)
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.1/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb:54:in `require'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.1/diakonos.rb:16:in `<top (required)>'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.1/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb:54:in `require'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.1/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb:54:in `require'
	from /usr/local/bin/diakonos:3:in `<main>'

I tried rebuilding and installing both devel/ncurses and devel/ruby-ncurses which I thought might be related but the problem persists.

$ uname -a
FreeBSD AntumD_FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE #0 r274401: Tue Nov 11 21:02:49 UTC 2014     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
